name.description: Name of the new Webhook integration

headers.description: Headers that should be sent to the webhook. Only string values and no nested objects

version.description: Version of the event type, if not provided latest version will be used

jsonPayloadEnabled.description: Flag if the payloads of this integration should be bridged in JSON format.

body.description: The Body of the bridge creation post contains the ID and the JSON payload converting flag.
